Title: Corporate Income Tax
Description: 0% for first 4 years, 5% for next 9 years, 10% thereafter for qualified entities

Title: Personal Income Tax
Description: Flat 15% for foreign experts working in VIFC (vs. up to 35% standard)

Title: Work Permits & Visas
Description: Streamlined visa-on-arrival, 5-year multiple entry for VIFC-registered employees

Title: Foreign Ownership
Description: 100% foreign ownership permitted for most financial services activities

Title: Currency & FX
Description: Free foreign exchange transactions within VIFC zone, relaxed capital controls

Title: Land & Office
Description: Preferential land lease rates, modern Grade A office space at $8-15/sqft/year

Title: Regulatory Sandbox
Description: Fast-track sandbox for fintech, blockchain, digital assets, and green finance

Title: Dispute Resolution
Description: International arbitration center with English common law option
